title: aeschynanthus citrinus
intro: Aeschynanthus citrinus, also known as the 'Citrine Lipstick Plant', is a flowering plant species belonging to the Gesneriaceae family, native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can be utilized to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Aeschynanthus citrinus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal and health benefits.
